name: Whole Wheat Apple-Raisin Bread - Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients except liquids and yeast in a large bowl.
3. Add liquid ingredients (water, butter) to the dry mixture.
4. Place the yeast into the yeast holder.
5. Pour the remaining liquid ingredients over the mix.
6. Transfer everything to the bread pan.
7. Cover with the lid.
8. Select "WHOLE WHEAT BAKE MODE" and press start.
9. The cycle will complete in approximately 5 minutes.
